texto: Even though I was manically overachieving and involved in everything, I still never felt like I belonged. That's definitely affected my whole life and why I wanted to become an actor and tell people stories, because communication and feeling like you belong is such an integral part of our social fabric.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Penelope Mitchell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Even though I was manically overachieving and involved in everything, I still never felt like I b…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, vida, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e why.
